title: Exposure of Sensitive Data due to Missing Security Controls
description: Given the lack of details on data classification and security controls, there's a high risk of sensitive data being exposed. This could occur due to vulnerabilities in data storage, transmission, or access control mechanisms.  Without knowing what data is stored, it's impossible to implement appropriate protection.
affected_component: Data Storage, Network Transmission, Access Controls
attack_vector: Data breaches, unauthorized access, insecure APIs, misconfigured cloud storage.
mitigations: Conduct a thorough data classification exercise to identify and categorize sensitive data.
Implement robust data encryption both in transit and at rest.
Enforce strict access controls based on the principle of least privilege.
